query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME
FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES t
WHERE t.TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE()
  AND t.TABLE_TYPE = 'BASE TABLE'
  AND t.TABLE_NAME NOT LIKE '%_bkp%'
  AND t.TABLE_NAME NOT LIKE '%_bkp2%'
  AND t.TABLE_NAME NOT LIKE '%_old%'
  AND t.TABLE_NAME NOT IN (
    '__drizzle_migrations', 'administradores', 'avaliacoes_documentos',
    'messageReadEvents', 'serviceSubjectDocuments', 'serviceTypeOrgUnits', 'solicitacoes_endereco'
  )
  AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS c 
       WHERE c.TABLE_NAME = t.TABLE_NAME AND c.TABLE_SCHEMA = t.TABLE_SCHEMA 
       AND c.EXTRA LIKE '%auto_increment%') = 0
ORDER BY TABLE_NAME;
